visual_base.visual_narrative_log: (1) A young woman with long dark hair, wearing a white blouse and a blue vest, stands in the middle of a large warehouse-style retail store aisle. She holds two rectangular mats—one cream-colored and one gray. The background features high industrial shelving units stacked with folded linens and pillows. Large, colorful text overlays appear at the top and bottom of the frame, including a corporate logo. (2) The camera zooms in for a close-up of the gray mat. A hand with manicured nails enters from the left and points to the textured, woven-like surface of the fabric. The woman continues to hold the mat steady, showing the rectangular border design indented into the plush material. (3) The shot shifts back to a medium view of the woman holding the cream mat. She smiles and gestures toward it. Bright, yellow and pink graphic bursts appear around the mat to emphasize its quality. The lighting is bright and even, typical of a warehouse environment. (4) The camera focuses on the reverse side of a gray mat as the woman flips it over. Her hands grip the edge, revealing a dotted, non-slip texture on the underside. Shelves behind her are filled with stacks of similar products in various neutral tones. (5) The woman gathers several mats—gray, cream, and a light green one—and holds them in a pile against her chest. She maintains eye contact with the lens while gesturing toward the shelf where more stock is located. The light green mat is shown individually on a shelf in a brief insert shot before returning to the main character.
visual_base.text_narrative_log: (1) [Logo]: COSTCO WHOLESALE. [Subtitle]: 記憶棉浴室地墊只要237元!. [Variety]: 枕頭能踩地上?. (2) [Subtitle]: 有試著把枕頭踩在腳下嗎?. (3) [Subtitle]: 你現在可以光明正大做這件事了. (4) [Subtitle]: 它這個材質摸起來如何. (5) [Subtitle]: 它就是那種記憶棉枕頭的材質. (6) [Subtitle]: 然後更Q更彈. (7) [Subtitle]: 啊我們來近拍一下. (8) [Subtitle]: 你看它上面其實是有一點這個簡單的紋路哦. (9) [Subtitle]: 摸起來好舒服哦. (10) [Subtitle]: 其實它的花紋讓它看起來[Variety]: 非常高級. (11) [Subtitle]: 它的配色也是很像那種高級飯店才有. (12) [Subtitle]: 重點是什麼[Variety]: 洗衣機洗. (13) [Subtitle]: 它可以丟進洗衣機洗. (14) [Subtitle]: 很多地墊都是不能水洗的. (15) [Subtitle]: 對啊每次地墊那個越踩越髒就很懊惱. (16) [Subtitle]: 對然後丟掉捨不得. (17) [Subtitle]: 但是它這個是直接讓你丟到洗衣機裡面洗的[Variety]: 真的很讚. (18) [Subtitle]: 有鐵灰白色以及綠色. (19) [Subtitle]: 綠色很神奇只剩下這一組. (20) [Subtitle]: 沒有錯那綠色最夯. (21) [Subtitle]: 如果要的人就是拿綠色. (22) [Subtitle]: 它一組只要475有兩個[Variety]: 哇!!!. (23) [Subtitle]: 兩個所以這樣子一個才230多. (24) [Subtitle]: 對啊兩入一組超級讚[Variety]: 很厚很讚. (25) [Subtitle]: 然後背後也是有做到防滑. (26) [Subtitle]: 哦這是安心感. (27) [Subtitle]: 然後這個腳是絕對吸的乾. (28) [Subtitle]: 因為非常的厚實. (29) [Subtitle]: 很不錯哎又很漂亮. (30) [Subtitle]: 這個很推薦新品. (31) [Subtitle]: 漂亮便宜又可以水洗. (32) [Subtitle]: 而且又是記憶棉. (33) [Subtitle]: 對能機洗就是讚.

visual_human_presence.countingEvidence: 1 main female creator on screen, 1 set of female hands belonging to the camera operator.
visual_human_presence.mainCharacterDescription: A young Asian woman with long, straight dark hair. She is wearing a white long-sleeved blouse with puffy shoulders and a sleeveless blue vest over it.

visual_scene_and_style.backgroundDescribe: The interior of a Costco warehouse. Large orange and metal industrial shelves are visible, stocked with home goods like pillows and bedding. Aisle markers (112, 114) are visible in the background.

audio_base.audio_narrative_log: (1) A high-pitched, enthusiastic female voice begins speaking in Mandarin at a fast pace. The background music (BGM) is an upbeat, mid-tempo acoustic track with prominent guitar strumming and a light drum beat. The vocal arousal is high. (2) A second female voice joins in, responding with equal excitement. A soft 'ding' sound effect emphasizes a key point mentioned by the first speaker. The ambient room tone is quiet, typical of a large indoor space. (3) A distinct 'whoosh' sound effect accompanies a change in the vocal flow as the speakers discuss the product's texture. The rustling of fabric is audible as the mats are handled. (4) A 'sparkle' sound effect plays when the price is mentioned. Both voices increase in volume and pitch variability to express surprise and satisfaction. (5) The BGM continues steadily at 120 BPM as the speakers wrap up their conversation. The first speaker maintains a friendly, narrative tone with clear articulation and high valence until the end.

narrative_and_purpose.narrativeStructure: Montage: Hook -> Demonstration -> Feature Highlight -> Value Proposition -> Summary
narrative_and_purpose.mainPurpose: The video aims to promote a specific '2-pack' memory foam bath mat available at Costco. It uses a high-energy, vlog-style interaction between two speakers to highlight key features: extreme comfort (comparable to a pillow), aesthetic hotel-like design, and the rare ability to be machine-washed. The low price is used as the final hook to encourage viewers to purchase.

endorsement_analysis.endorsementCues: The creator is showcasing a specific product within a branded retail environment (Costco) and highlighting its price and features in a promotional manner.

high_inference.freeDescribe: The video uses typical social media 'variety show' editing with large captions and sound effects to maintain high viewer engagement. The focus on practicality (washability) and price (237 TWD per mat) targets budget-conscious lifestyle consumers.
